title: Create a Simple Recipe Display Template

source.module: Core Django Fundamentals – Templates & Static Content

topicTags: Core Django Fundamentals – Templates & Static Content

content.problemStatement:
In this practice problem, you'll create a simple recipe display template using Django. 

### Task
You need to update the following
- In `urls.py` - update the urlpattern for the `/recipe/` page
- In `views.py` - update the return statement to render the HTML template. \
Remember to send the context dictionary in the return statement
- Update `recipe.html` using Django templating to get the following output when we visit the URL - `/recipe/`
